results.name: indoor
results.description: Objects, scenes, characters and events that are or occur indoors, and not outside.

results.name: indrelon
results.description: The Magic Mirror of Eldraine.

results.name: infinite guideline
results.description: The space station hosting Sothera's eternity column.

results.name: infinity
results.description: The lemniscate or infinity symbol.

results.name: infusion
results.description: If you gained life this turn, do a thing

results.name: ingeloakastimizilian
results.description: Also known as Icingdeath.

results.name: ingest
results.description: Permanents that exile one or more cards from the top of an opponent's library upon dealing combat damage.

results.name: ingle
results.description: Mirrodin's black sun.

results.name: injury
results.description: Wounds and injuries.

results.name: innistrad faction symbol
results.description: Faction symbols found on Innistrad.

results.name: inscryption achievement
results.description: Cards that share a name with achievements in the PC game Inscryption

results.name: inspired
results.description: Cards that care about the action of untapping a permanent. For cards that care about untapped permanents, see [synergy-untapped](synergy-untapped) and [untapped matters-self](untapped-matters-self).

results.name: instant-sorcery-dichotomous
results.description: Cards that care about instants and sorceries separately.

results.name: instant speed discard
results.description: Discard effects that can deny the opponent the card they draw each turn

results.name: instrument
results.description: The musical kind.

results.name: interplanar
results.description: Depicting more than one of Magic's planes.

results.name: interrupt
results.description: This spell was an interrupt before Sixth Edition Rules introduced the stack.

results.name: intervening if clause
results.description: At/When/Whenever [event], if [clause], [effect].

results.name: invisible chair
results.description: Sometimes when you're magical you just gotta sit floating in the air.

results.name: invitational card
results.description: Cards designed by players who won Invitationals. The original print traditionally features the winning player. See also [Player Spotlight](player-spotlight).

results.name: iron alliance
results.description: The forces led by Urza in the Brothers' War. Urza's forces are often bulky and heavily-armored with a gold and steel-blue color scheme.

results.name: iron man (reference)
results.description: These artworks are referencing Iron Man. For Marvel's Iron Man, see [iron man](/tags/artwork/iron-man).
